[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101101101 6
1 001111111 7
2 011101101 6
3 111001000 4
4 101111110 7
5 111111111 a
6 111101111 8
7 001111110 6

01 100010001 3
12 000100100 2
23 010001000 2
34 100000000 1
45 000011100 3
56 110000001 3
67 000101110 4
70 000000000 a

02 000110001 3
13 010001100 3
24 110000000 2
35 000010000 1
46 000000001 1
57 000100011 3
60 000000110 2
71 100010000 2

03 010001001 3
14 010000000 1
25 000001000 1
36 100000000 1
47 000101111 5
50 000000010 1
61 000010010 2
72 000010000 1

04 110000000 2
15 000001100 2
26 110000000 2
37 000100010 2
40 000000110 2
51 100000011 3
62 000110110 4
73 010000000 1

05 000011000 2
16 010000000 1
27 000001000 1
30 000000010 1
41 000010011 3
52 000100011 3
63 000001100 2
74 110000000 2

06 110000001 3
17 000101100 3
20 000000000 a
31 100010010 3
42 000110111 5
53 010000001 2
64 000000000 a
75 000010000 1

07 000101001 3
10 000000100 1
21 100000000 1

43 000001101 3
